picks.quote: I expect him to come forward. I expect him to bomb away. I expect him to get it to the ground. I expect him to win this fight.
I think Vinicius wins this fight... I do think Vinicius wins though. I'm confident enough. I do have a small bet on him.
Bea Malecki's opponent sucks. That's it. Let that soak in. She sucks. So, I think Bea Malecki wins this fight, clearly.
Luana Santos is one... And if Luana Santos wins, it's because those judges appreciate the takedowns and the control. That's it. And I think she can do that.
I think Mitch wins this fight. I actually think he wins. This isn't like, 'Oh, good dog.' I actually think he wins this fight.
in the main event, I think Horiguichi flat-out wins this fight... So, I am picking him and I think he's a good dog.
I think Sterling wins, and you can go watch my breakdown video to get the full details as to why, but I think we end up with a decision, not a finish.
I do think Andre Lima wins this fight. I'm confident that Andre Lima should win this fight.
